source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Sora SemiBold for compact display marks, Inter for precise product UI, JetBrains Mono for tabular data, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, tables, and status text.
layout: Horn-notched dividers, compact dashboard grids, angular tabs, fine wing-vein rules, dotted shell textures, dense but readable tables, command search, 8px radii, restrained shadows, and leaf-green focus states.

prompts.label: Transparent treehopper motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, copied by generated-image snapshot diff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Treehopper transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated treehopper silhouette motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no text. Subject: A single tropical treehopper in side profile with an exaggerated horned thorn-like pronotum, compact insect body, angular legs, tiny eye, crisp antennae, and a quirky identity-system silhouette. Use motif-derived colors: deep leaf green and moss green on the horn and body, cream highlights on shell facets, warm brown twig-like leg accents, and dark olive contour shadows. The treehopper should read as a real insect but with a graphic, memorable silhouette suitable for a brand identity. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full horn, body, head, legs, and antennae without cropping. Keep the silhouette clean and recognizable at small size. Lighting/mood: clean studio light, natural insect texture, crisp edges, no cast shadow. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no stem, no leaf, no flower, no landscape, no second insect, no logo text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Treehopper light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent treehopper motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, silhouette language, and visual identity. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Treehopper", derived from the visible horned treehopper cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, clean editorial design-system board. Required visible sections: Morphous Treehopper, Treehopper, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from the motif: deep leaf green shell, moss green horn, cream shell patches, warm brown legs and wing veins, olive shadows, translucent brown wing membrane, pale stem cream, and tropical stem context. Translate the treehopper's quirky thorn silhouette into identity-system details: angular tabs, horn-notched dividers, compact pill badges, fine vein lines, dotted shell texture, and twig-brown focus accents. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, chart samples, form stack, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, and simple product icons. Typography: include English type guidance plus Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels, suitable for multilingual product UI. Use clean sans UI, compact display, mono numerals, and Noto Sans JP guidance. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style quirky identity system, precise grid, restrained product UI, light cream background, leaf-green primary actions, brown stem accents, cream panels, transparent wing overlays, fine dotted shell texture, crisp 8px-or-less card radius, compact but readable labels. Color constraints: use only motif-derived greens, browns, creams, olives, and near-neutrals; avoid unrelated saturated colors; avoid generic purple or blue gradients. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Treehopper" or "Treehopper", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Treehopper dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent treehopper motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Treehopper". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible horned treehopper cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, clean editorial design-system board. Required visible sections: Morphous Treehopper, Treehopper, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background derived from deepest olive shell shadows and tropical stem night; foreground from cream shell highlights; primary actions from bright leaf green; secondary states from moss green; accents from twig brown and wing amber; borders from muted olive; panels from deep green-black with translucent wing overlays; texture from dotted shell pores, fine wing veins, and thorn-like horn notches. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: include English type guidance plus Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels, suitable for multilingual product UI. Use clean sans UI, compact display, mono numerals, and Noto Sans JP guidance. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style quirky identity system, precise grid, restrained product UI, dark olive surfaces, cream text, leaf-green focus rings, warm brown status accents, crisp 8px-or-less card radius, compact but readable labels. Preserve the light board's information architecture and component density. Color constraints: use only motif-derived greens, browns, creams, olives, dark neutrals, and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Treehopper" or "Treehopper", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
